content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat     Personal     Personal interest rates, fees and charges     Home loan interest rates     All home loan interest rates   All home loan interest rates   View all our home loan interest rates in one handy location.    Understanding our rates    These are our current fixed and variable home loan interest rates for new loans for both owner occupiers and investors. Our interest rates are NAB’s advertised indicator rates plus or minus any margins.    See also our current indicator rates (PDF, 41KB), opens in new window     used to calculate our current interest rates.     Variable home loan interest rates  Fixed home loan interest rates  Lines of credit    Variable home loan interest rates    For more information on comparison rates please refer to our important information below. Learn more about the NAB Portfolio Facility   Back to top ^    Contact us for home loan related queries   This is how you can get in touch.    Start a conversation with a banker    Log into either NAB Internet Banking or the NAB app.  Tap on the message icon.  Type ‘speak to a person’ in the conversation window.    Call us   Speak to a home loan expert about a new or existing home loan.    Monday to Friday, 8:00am to 7:00pm (AEST/AEDT) Saturday to Sunday, 9:00am to 6:00pm (AEST/AEDT)    13 78 79    Book an appointment   Make an appointment to see us at your nearest branch, ask a mobile banker to come to you or ask us to call you back.    Book an appointment   Important Information   Terms and Conditions         Disclaimer 1   Rates are NAB’s advertised indicator rates plus or minus any margins and available for new home loans.        Disclaimer 2   Comparison rates are based on a secured loan of $150,000 over a term of 25 years  WARNING: This comparison rate applies only to the example or examples given. Different amounts and terms will result in different comparison rates. Costs such as redraw fees or early repayment fees, and cost savings such as fee waivers, are not included in the comparison rate but may influence the cost of the loan.        Disclaimer 3   LVR tiered pricing  LVR tiered interest rates for the NAB Tailored Home Loan are accessible to:   new home loan contracts issued on or after 25 July 2022 for customers who apply through brokers (broker customers) or on or after 12 September 2022 for retail customers who apply directly to us (retail customers), and  credit critical variations (for example, a loan increase or a change to security) to home loans for both broker customers and retail customers made after those dates.  LVR tiered interest rates do not apply to:   NAB Tailored Home Loans issued prior to the above mentioned dates (unless a credit critical variation is made after those dates),  NAB Tailored Home Loans for customers who have a Business and Private Relationship with NAB – see Important interest rate information for Business and Private Wealth customers.  NAB Tailored Home Loans included in a Choice Package, nor  NAB Base Variable Home Loans.        Disclaimer 4   Important interest rate information for Business and Private Wealth customers  Customers that have a Business or Private Wealth relationship with NAB are able to access the same initial advertised rate as our retail customers. Please note that we will achieve this for those customers by applying a discount customer margin. This customer margin will stop applying in a range of situations including (but not limited to):   Product swaps (switching your home loan product)  End or expiry of an interest only period  Commencement, end or expiry of a fixed rate period  Loan limit increases.  Please speak to your banker for further information about scenarios where you may lose your customer margin.        Disclaimer 5   NAB Choice Package eligibility  Important: The NAB Choice Package Home Loan is no longer available for sale from 23 February 2023 for broker customers, from 17 March 2023 for retail (direct to bank) customers and from 18 August 2023 for customers with a Business or Private Wealth relationship with NAB, unless they have a current NAB Choice Package which is established before the respective off-sale date (and which remains ongoing).        Disclaimer 6   Interest-only periods  Before you choose an interest only period, take the time to consider these things:   Your debt doesn’t reduce while you only pay your interest charges because you’re not paying any of the principal.  You may owe more than your property is worth if its value decreases during an interest only period.  Your scheduled repayments will increase once your interest only period ends.  NAB Tailored Home Loan - Principal and Interest is the only product available to foreign (overseas) applicants. Conditions apply.    This section contains Important Information relevant to the page you are viewing, but you can't see it because you have JavaScript disabled on your browser. Please enable JavaScript and come back so you can see the complete page. It's important that you read the Important Information in this section before acting on any information on this page.    Apologies but the Important Information section you are trying to view is not displaying properly at the moment. Please refresh the page or try again later.   Other important information    Information and rates are correct as at 17 March 2025 and are subject to change. Applications for credit are subject to NAB’s credit approval criteria. Terms and Conditions apply to all NAB products and are available on application. Fees and charges are payable.    Annual package fee applies for NAB Choice Package (currently $395). Choice Package discounts and benefits only apply whilst your loan is part of a NAB Choice Package. When you apply for the NAB Choice Package, you must include in the package a minimum of $150,000 in eligible lending products (which are existing or approved lending).
